name: Kiwi Fruit Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda into a bowl.
2. Add sugar and mix; stir in kiwi.
3. Combine eggs, oil, and milk; gently stir into dry ingredients until just moistened. Do not overmix.
4. Spoon the batter into lightly greased muffin pans or use foil/paper liners, filling them about 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Let cool on wire racks. Makes about 18 medium muffins.
